utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists five items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all five sections are present. Each section is fully specified with both type/coverage details and costs. Health coverage includes physical and mental health insurance and monthly cost; property coverage includes home/contents insurance and cost; travel coverage includes travel insurance and cost; additional services are listed with costs; and total budget includes complete monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all five items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four LifeFirst policies: (1) health_coverage combining physical and mental health under LifeFirst, (2) property_coverage as LifeFirst home contents and professional equipment coverage, (3) travel_coverage as LifeFirst comprehensive travel plan, and (4) additional_services as LifeFirst premium membership. From the ground-truth ratings, these correspond to: for health coverage, LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health rating 9) and LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health rating 4); for property coverage, LifeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 9); for travel coverage, LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9); and for additional services, Premium Insurance Membership (rating 6). Therefore, the mapping includes all these items with their respective ratings.
